summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Russian Merchant Shop integration for Мерчант Казино. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI functional with API key connection and payment flow.

ui_bugs.issue: Some CSS selector syntax issues in automated tests, but UI functions correctly

passed_tests: ✅ Operators loading with payment methods (card, sbp)
✅ Transaction history API and UI display
✅ Frontend merchant shop UI loads correctly
✅ API integration between frontend and backend
